description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Save to your favorites a Billing & Payments help article about changing the billing address for a saved payment method that was updated within the last 12 months.

target_names: Change your billing address for a saved card

criteria.about: changing billing address for a saved payment method

tasks.name: Save to your favorites a Billing & Payments help article about changing the billing address for a saved payment method that was updated within the last 12 months.
tasks.description: Save to your favorites a Billing & Payments help article about changing the billing address for a saved payment method that was updated within the last 12 months.

tasks.instruction: Find an Orders & Returns help article that explains the refund policy for orders placed in 2024 or later and save its link in a new note titled 'Refund policies 2024'.

target_names: Refund policy for orders placed after January 1, 2024

tasks.name: Find an Orders & Returns help article that explains the refund policy for orders placed in 2024 or later and save its link in a new note titled 'Refund policies 2024'.

tasks.instruction: Among the troubleshooting guides for login problems, compare the step counts of the first two results and start the guided flow for the one with fewer than 10 steps and fewer steps than the other.

target_names: Can't log in? Quick troubleshooting guide

tasks.name: Among the troubleshooting guides for login problems, compare the step counts of the first two results and start the guided flow for the one with fewer than 10 steps and fewer steps than the other.

tasks.instruction: Using the support chat under a Delivery & Tracking topic, open a suggested help article whose title includes the phrase 'tracking number' and then minimize the chat widget.

target_names: Where to find your tracking number

tasks.name: Using the support chat under a Delivery & Tracking topic, open a suggested help article whose title includes the phrase 'tracking number' and then minimize the chat widget.
tasks.description: Using the support chat under a Delivery & Tracking topic, open a suggested help article whose title includes the phrase 'tracking number' and then minimize the chat widget.

tasks.instruction: Submit a support request about a damaged item in order #12345, categorizing it under Orders & Shipping with high urgency and choosing phone as the preferred contact method in an afternoon time window.
tasks.name: Submit a support request about a damaged item in order #12345, categorizing it under Orders & Shipping with high urgency and choosing phone as the preferred contact method in an afternoon time window.
tasks.description: Submit a support request about a damaged item in order #12345, categorizing it under Orders & Shipping with high urgency and choosing phone as the preferred contact method in an afternoon time window.

tasks.instruction: In the community forums, follow an answered thread about a coupon code not working that shows at least 5 replies.

target_names: Coupon code not working even though my cart is over $50

tasks.name: In the community forums, follow an answered thread about a coupon code not working that shows at least 5 replies.

tasks.instruction: Switch the help center to Spanish, search for 'envío', open a Spanish video guide about tracking your shipment or finding the tracking number, and rate it positively.

target_names: Cómo seguir tu envío y actualizaciones de entrega (video)

criteria.topic_about: tracking your shipment or finding the tracking number

tasks.name: Switch the help center to Spanish, search for 'envío', open a Spanish video guide about tracking your shipment or finding the tracking number, and rate it positively.

tasks.instruction: From the Account & Security FAQs, open the article that explains how to enable two-factor authentication, switch to the methods section, and expand the SMS codes area including its advanced settings subsection.

target_names: How do I enable two-factor authentication (2FA)?

tasks.instruction: Using the self-service returns tool, start and confirm a return for the most recent delivered order with a total over $50 by selecting 'Received damaged item' as the reason and choosing the earliest available return date.
